dc:title: Street Along a Fortified Wall with a Domed Church
dc:description: Urban street scene viewed from a low position behind an out-of-focus bicycle or motor-scooter saddle and handlebar in the foreground. A paved roadway curves through the center of the frame, with lane markings, a sidewalk, moving and parked automobiles, a small van, and a pedestrian near the stone wall. On the left, a long masonry defensive wall with crenellations runs parallel to the street, with a domed church or ecclesiastical building rising behind it. On the right are street trees, streetlights, bollards, and a low commercial frontage with outdoor tables. The scene is photographed in clear daylight with strong shadows; color values are not verified.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
